laws.title: Public Law 24-176 | Comprehensive Federal Government Funding Act
laws.required_code_treatment: no current code text; keep only source-limited history

source_evidence.classification: manifest marks the source unrecoverable; final report says SOURCE_UNAVAILABLE

laws.recommended_action: Retain as unrecoverable history only and flag for source reacquisition.

laws.title: Public Law 24-177 | SS Jurisdiction Act

source_evidence.classification: final report classifies the Trello record as repealed and says it is not inserted as current Code text

laws.recommended_action: Keep only a repeal-history note and do not add operative Code text.

laws.title: Public Law 24-178 | Equality in Employment Act
laws.required_code_treatment: keep the 42 U.S.C. 2000e-2(a) amendment and a concise statutory note; no extra text beyond the direct amendment

current_implementation.branch_vs_origin: origin/main differs from HEAD; HEAD includes the inserted gender-identity and sexual-orientation amendment plus the USAR note

source_evidence.xml: usc/usc42.xml at 42 U.S.C. 2000e-2(a) shows the inserted text and amendment note

laws.recommended_action: Leave the Title 42 amendment in place and keep only a compact statutory note for the amendment history.

laws.title: Public Law 25-179 | Fiscal Year 21-2
laws.required_code_treatment: treat SEC 5 as a temporary note at 2 U.S.C. 4501 and keep the appropriations material out of permanent Code text

current_implementation.branch_vs_origin: origin/main differs from HEAD; HEAD contains a statutory note for PL-025-179

source_evidence.source_text: SEC 5 suspends adjustments under 2 U.S.C. 4501 for FY 21-2

laws.recommended_action: Keep only the temporary history note and do not promote the appropriations provisions to permanent text.

laws.title: Public Law 25-180 | Sanction Repealment Act
laws.required_code_treatment: no current code text; if the repeal of PL-009-055 is not already reflected elsewhere, record it only at the PL-009-055 home

source_evidence.source_text: SEC 3(b) repeals PL 9-55 and SEC 3(c) nullifies the sanctions

laws.recommended_action: Treat the law itself as repealed history and ensure any repeal-marking for PL-009-055 lives at the target's home, not as new permanent text here.

laws.title: Public Law 25-181 | Federal District of Columbia Criminal Code
laws.required_code_treatment: no current code text; preserve only as D.C. history if retained at all

source_evidence.classification: final report classifies the Trello record as repealed and rejects current Code insertion

laws.recommended_action: Keep only source-limited history and do not surface the D.C. criminal code as current U.S. Code text.

laws.title: Public Law 25-182 | Pentagon Expansion and National Territory Authorization Act
laws.required_code_treatment: no current code text; retain only source-limited history

source_evidence.classification: final report says no readable authenticated enactment text could be recovered

laws.recommended_action: Retain only a source-limited record until the actual enactment text is recovered.

laws.title: Public Law 25-183 | Commerce and Labor Advancement Act (CLAA)
laws.required_code_treatment: no current code insertion; keep only history because PL-031-226 repeals the law

current_implementation.xml: no verified XML placement for this law in the current branch

source_evidence.later_law: PL-031-226 repeals PL-025-183 in its entirety
source_evidence.source_text: SEC 6 establishes the Department of Commerce and Labor and related licensing/enforcement rules

laws.recommended_action: Keep the law only as superseded history and do not insert operative Code text.

laws.title: Public Law 25-184 | Legal Advisors, Representatives, and Professionals Exam Regulations (LARPER)
laws.required_code_treatment: no current code insertion; keep only history because PL-033-238 repeals the law

current_implementation.xml: no verified XML placement for this law in the current branch

source_evidence.later_law: PL-033-238 repeals PL-025-184 in its entirety
source_evidence.source_text: SEC 6-12 create the Uniform Legal Practice Authority licensing and discipline framework

laws.recommended_action: Keep the law only as superseded history and do not insert operative Code text.

laws.title: Public Law 25-185 | Fiscal Year 21-3
laws.required_code_treatment: exclude from permanent code text; if retained, keep only a historical note

current_implementation.branch_vs_origin: origin/main differs from HEAD; HEAD includes a statutory note that still presents the act as current

source_evidence.source_text: SEC 3-14 are appropriations and reporting provisions for a short fiscal period; SEC 5 is a temporary 2 U.S.C. 4501 adjustment

laws.recommended_action: Reclassify the measure as expired appropriations history and remove any implication that it is current Code text.
